description: Revise the bl-7b8f task schema to the resolved format decision (spec bl-2e26 §3/§4, amended 2026-06-05): ONE serialization format, TOML, everywhere — task frontmatter and config. Swap serde_yaml_ng -> toml in src/task.rs. Task files are '+++'-fenced TOML frontmatter + free-form markdown body; canonical serializer form is scalars-first, each blocker a [[blockers]] table. created/updated become i64 unix seconds (storage/transit always unix-time; ISO-8601 only at display, §9) — drops all date code from the storage layer. Unknown-key passthrough still via #[serde(flatten)] toml::Table (verified: toml 0.8 hoists scalars before tables, no ordering error). src/id.rs is format-agnostic, unchanged. Config files rename .yaml->.toml is a separate ball (config loader). Keep 100% coverage + <300 lines/file.
title: Schema format: TOML frontmatter + unix-time timestamps (revises §3/§4)
